props.text: Vehicle encapsulation complete — fairing closeout nominal
Eastern Range GO for launch on Jun 18 window
Launch weather: 85% favorable — acceptable winds at 250mb
Payload power-on delayed 2h — troubleshooting IMU heater
Drone ship OCISLY departed Port Canaveral — on station by T-6h
Flame deflector water system test complete — NOMINAL
Booster B1073.8 propellant loading simulation complete
IFT-9 booster 14 stacking paused — GSE inspection
Crew medical checks complete — crew GO for launch
GOES observation: no upper level wind anomalies
GO Searcher departed Port Canaveral for recovery station
SCRUB: LC-39A ground support equipment fault — recycling 24h
